purpose: Monaco Editor wrapper that owns the IDE's primary code surface. Imports '@/utils/monacoWorkerSetup' BEFORE 'monaco-editor' to install the AMD worker URL shim. Creates a single Monaco editor instance once on mount with glyphMargin enabled, minimap, bracket pair colorization, and a dynamically-built 'synapse-dynamic-N' theme derived from CSS custom properties (--editor-bg, --editor-fg, etc.) so the editor live-tracks the Synapse theme via a MutationObserver on documentElement's data-theme/style attributes. Loads file contents via window.electronAPI.ideReadFile(filePath, workspacePath) and reapplies via editor.setValue + monaco.editor.setModelLanguage. Tracks dirty state via originalContentRef vs editor.getValue() and dispatches IDE_MARK_FILE_DIRTY/IDE_MARK_FILE_CLEAN. Owns three independent decoration layers (breakpoints, diagnostics, debug-current-line) each managed via deltaDecorations with its own ref. Breakpoints are stored in a module-level Map<filePath, Set<lineNumber>> (allBreakpoints) so they persist across file switches and component re-renders, and toggled via gutter-glyph or line-number clicks (onMouseDown filtering on MouseTargetType.GUTTER_GLYPH_MARGIN | GUTTER_LINE_NUMBERS). Diagnostics are debounced 500ms via diagnosticsTimerRef, fetched from window.electronAPI.ideCheckSyntax, applied as Monaco markers under owner 'synapse-diagnostics' (squiggles) and gutter glyphs (deduped by line, highest severity wins via severityRank map). Debug pause highlighting uses isWholeLine 'debug-current-line' decoration plus revealLineInCenter when state.debugSession.status === 'paused' AND pausedFile matches currentFilePathRef. Listens to state.ideNavigateToLine (revealLineInCenter + setPosition + focus) for cross-component navigation from ProblemsPanel/DebugPanels/SearchPanel.
gotchas: Worker setup MUST be imported before monaco-editor (`import '@/utils/monacoWorkerSetup'` first) — otherwise Monaco language workers fail to spawn under Vite/Electron.

buildSynapseTheme() registers a NEW theme each call ('synapse-dynamic-' + ++_themeVersion) — do not call it in a tight loop or you'll leak named themes; it is intentionally invoked only on theme/style mutations and on initial mount.

Breakpoints live in a MODULE-LEVEL Map (allBreakpoints) — they persist across re-renders/file switches but also leak across full hot reloads in dev. Toggling dispatches DEBUG_TOGGLE_BREAKPOINT but the dispatch is wrapped in try/catch because the action may not exist yet (legacy comment).

Three decoration layers (breakpointDecorationsRef, diagnosticDecorationsRef, debugLineDecorationsRef) each call deltaDecorations independently — you MUST keep their decoration ID arrays separate, or one layer will wipe another.
Diagnostics owner string 'synapse-diagnostics' (DIAGNOSTICS_OWNER) must NOT collide with breakpoint or debug line markers — model markers are scoped per-owner.
currentFilePathRef is checked AFTER the async ideCheckSyntax IPC returns to detect tab-switch race; if user changed files, results are dropped silently.
Save command (Cmd/Ctrl+S) is re-registered on every handleSave change because Monaco's addCommand captures the closure — without re-registration, save would call a stale handler with old filePath.
If a file's read fails or it's binary, fileLoadFailedRef is set and runDiagnostics short-circuits — otherwise diagnostics IPC would error on every load.
automaticLayout is OFF; layout is driven by ResizeObserver on containerRef — wrapping container must have a deterministic size or the editor renders 0×0.

Editor is created ONCE (empty deps in mount effect); file/workspace changes load content into the existing model via setValue + setModelLanguage. Disposing/recreating the editor on every prop change would leak Monaco models.
patterns: Module-level breakpoint state (allBreakpoints Map) survives React unmount; component-level refs hold per-mount editor instance + decoration IDs.
Debounced diagnostics (500ms) re-run after save (handleSave calls runDiagnostics) and on file load.
Theme is rebuilt from CSS variables and re-applied on documentElement attribute mutations (data-theme/style) — Synapse theme switches propagate to Monaco automatically.

Cross-component navigation pattern: external code dispatches { key:'ideNavigateToLine', value: { filePath, line, column, ts } } → CodeEditor effect compares filePath and reveals/sets position. The `ts` field forces re-trigger on identical line.
Dirty/clean state is dual-tracked: originalContentRef (local, for editor) + IDE_MARK_FILE_DIRTY action (global, for tabs).
Severity-to-glyph mapping is centralized via severityToGlyphClass + SEVERITY_MAP for consistency across diagnostics and Problems panel.
conventions: Refs end with `Ref` (editorRef, modelRef, currentFilePathRef, fileIdRef, originalContentRef, diagnosticsTimerRef, fileLoadFailedRef, breakpointDecorationsRef, diagnosticDecorationsRef, debugLineDecorationsRef, gutterClickDisposableRef, onChangeDisposableRef).
Decoration arrays are RETURN VALUES of deltaDecorations and immediately reassigned — never push/splice into the existing array.
Section comments use `/* ── Title ─── */` divider style.
All IPC calls guarded by `window.electronAPI?.method` optional chaining.
